thoughts_pipelineagentoutputs_8825974010.content: The build agent failed silently — JSONL output was truncated and classify.json was never written. No error was surfaced in the build step output.

thoughts_srcserverpayload_882598828887.content: pnpm verify (lint/typecheck) catches pre-existing errors in the broader codebase, not just the task at hand. Classification-only tasks should suppress it.

facts_pipeline_882600066594.content: Classification-only tasks write no source files — they only produce an output artifact (classify.json) and update status.json. The verify step is extraneous noise for such tasks.

thoughts_task_verification_942576066943.content: Verify step (pnpm verify) surfaced 13 pre-existing errors unrelated to this task. These need to be suppressed when they predate the current task.

facts_never_pipeline_task_942577401736.content: For 'never' (classification-only) tasks, no source files should be touched — only classify.json and status.json.
